TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_London, title = London, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/London} }

S.FORM: == London == O siyoto no United Kingdom ko London. Itini i 51¬į30‚Ä≤26‚Ä≥N 0¬į07‚Ä≤39‚Ä≥W noYoropa ko London. Polong no sekalay i 1,572 sq km. "O sekalay no sera i, 1,572 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 0 sq km " Polong i 8,908,081 ko tamdaw. Rikisi Falaw Rarikah-Hont Pitooran Sowal Saka'orip Ponka Mihamhamay-tayal
S.PHON: == …ĺo~un…¨~…ģo~un == o~u sijo~uto~u no~u o~u~unit…ô…¨~…ģ kiŇč…¨~…ģo~um ko~u …ĺo~un…¨~…ģo~un. itini i *********n ********w no~ujo~uro~upa ko~u …ĺo~un…¨~…ģo~un. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i *,*** s* km. "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, *,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, * s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. rikisi fa…ĺaw rarikańß-ńßo~unt pito~uo~uran so~uwa…ĺ saka °o~urip po~unka mińßamńßamaj-taja…ĺ
